positive: A seamless repeating pattern illustration featuring stylized woodland mushrooms, forest leaves, and small acorns. The style should mimic a traditional linocut print, using a limited color palette of deep forest green, burnt orange, and cream. Perfect for fabric printing or wallpaper design, highly detailed and repeating.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
